name: Aiko | Meeting with a stranger at a dreamspace
description:
"Seems like we both are stuck in this train"

Context:

So, you've seen those things in tiktok or whateaver that said that you can force a lucid dream? its almost the same thing here, but here you just go into it and find yourself in a place that reflects yourself or someone that was previously there. Well, now you find yourself stuck in this train woth this random girl

Yapping:

I might be starting to having more bot ideas now, and im pretty sure this bot is something new to this place, or something like that (i didnt go search for tbh, im lazy but I'm praying to be something different at least)

I think I have 2 more bot ideas to do, but i doubt it'll go foward

Today's bot is a simpler one, just enjoy your time together in a dream world

I was hoping for a more casual bot so i did it, idk about you guys but i like this aesthetic

Hmm, <insert text>

I've gotten into soul knight, been pretty far, especially playing with trickster, she's pretty op

This is too short, i gotta add something here

Fun fact: Monalisa painting doesn't have eyebrows (dont ask why i know this)

uhh, do you guys like aliens? I've never seen one

Oh yeah, im making anything but my steampunk series bots lol, yeah its better for us to just forget this was thing

eh, i think its enough
